auth.label: API Key
auth.description: WorkOS secret API key sent as a Bearer token. View and manage keys in the WorkOS Dashboard: https://dashboard.workos.com/api-keys.

actions.name: create_organization
actions.description: Create a WorkOS organization in the current environment.

allow_profiles_outside_organization.description: Whether the organization allows profiles from outside the organization to sign in.

domain_data.description: Domains associated with the organization, including verification state.

metadata.description: Metadata key/value pairs associated with the resource.

external_id.description: An external identifier for the organization.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a WorkOS organization.

id.description: Unique identifier of the organization.

name.description: A descriptive name for the organization.

metadata.description: Metadata key/value pairs associated with the resource.

anyOf.description: The external ID of the organization.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the organization was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the organization was last updated.

actions.name: create_organization_membership
actions.description: Create an active WorkOS organization membership for a user and organization.

organization_id.description: The ID of the organization which the user belongs to.

role_slugs.description: Role identifiers to assign to the user.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a WorkOS organization membership.

id.description: The unique ID of the organization membership.

userId.description: The ID of the WorkOS user.

organizationId.description: The ID of the WorkOS organization.

organizationName.description: The name of the WorkOS organization.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the organization membership was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the organization membership was last updated.

actions.name: create_user
actions.description: Create a WorkOS AuthKit user in the current environment.

email.description: The email address of the user.

first_name.description: The first name of the user.

last_name.description: The last name of the user.

email_verified.description: Whether the user's email address was previously verified.

metadata.description: Metadata key/value pairs associated with the resource.

external_id.description: The external identifier of the user.

password.description: The password to set for the user.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a WorkOS user.

id.description: The unique ID of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

anyOf.description: The first name of the user.
The last name of the user.
The user's full name.

email_verified.description: Whether the user's email has been verified.

anyOf.description: The external ID of the user.

metadata.description: Metadata key/value pairs associated with the resource.

created_at.description: An ISO 8601 timestamp for when the user was created.

updated_at.description: An ISO 8601 timestamp for when the user was last updated.

actions.name: deactivate_organization_membership

actions.name: list_organization_memberships
actions.description: List WorkOS organization memberships filtered by user, organization, or membership status.

before.description: An object ID that defines the cursor position before the requested page.

after.description: An object ID that defines the cursor position after the requested page.

limit.description: Upper limit on the number of objects to return, between 1 and 100.

order.description: Order the results by creation time.

organization_id.description: The ID of the organization which the user belongs to.

statuses.description: Statuses to include in the membership list.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing WorkOS organization memberships.

id.description: The unique ID of the organization membership.

userId.description: The ID of the WorkOS user.

organizationId.description: The ID of the WorkOS organization.

organizationName.description: The name of the WorkOS organization.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the organization membership was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the organization membership was last updated.

anyOf.description: Cursor for the previous page when returned by WorkOS.
Cursor for the next page when returned by WorkOS.

list_metadata.description: WorkOS pagination metadata returned for a list request.

outputSchema.description: A page of WorkOS organization memberships.

limit.description: Upper limit on the number of objects to return, between 1 and 100.

order.description: Order the results by creation time.

search.description: Search text matched against organization names.
